items.title: Follow live: Pistons look to level series against Magic in Game 4

items.title: Flagg edges Knueppel in tight Rookie of Year vote
items.dek: Mavericks star Cooper Flagg, who shattered records as a teenage rookie this season, earned Rookie of the Year on Monday.
items.body: Mavericks star Cooper Flagg, who shattered records as a teenage rookie this season, earned Rookie of the Year on Monday.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Simpson: Met secretly with McVay before draft
items.dek: Newly drafted QB Ty Simpson said in an ESPN Radio interview that he kept his meeting with coach Sean McVay "private" in accordance with the Rams' wishes.
items.body: Newly drafted QB Ty Simpson said in an ESPN Radio interview that he kept his meeting with coach Sean McVay "private" in accordance with the Rams' wishes.
items.author: IriLine Desk
